---
name: Cultural Safety Concern
about: Report wording or prompt behavior that may be culturally unsafe
title: "[Safety Concern] "
labels: ["safety", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Concern Summary
Describe the concern clearly and respectfully.

## Where It Appears
Provide file path and section heading.

## Why It May Be Unsafe
Describe potential impact on communities, users, or engagement quality.

## Suggested Safer Alternative
If possible, suggest revised wording, framing, or constraints.

## Supporting References
Add trusted references (community authority, policy, legal framework, or reputable guidance).

## Confidentiality Request (Optional)
If this issue should be handled with extra discretion, note that here.
